journal.name: Northwestern Journal of Technology and Intellectual Property

registry_refs.key: Northwestern Journal of Technology and Intellectual Property

publication_scope.notes: Issue/article pages live under /njtip/; PDFs use /cgi/viewcontent.cgi?context=njtip.

evidence.notes: Publication HTML and cgi/viewcontent are not disallowed; administrative, account, and /do/ routes are disallowed.
Single all-issues page exposes 23 volumes and 78 issue links, from Volume 1 Issue 1 (2003) through Volume 23 Issues 1-3 (2025-2026), with no pagination.
Newest issue has four div.article-list div.doc records with title/detail links, span.auth authors, and p.pdf viewcontent links.
Detail citation meta exposes title, author Vanessa Villanueva Collao, institution, date 2026, volume 23, issue 3, first page 435, PDF URL, ISSN, and a substantive #abstract.
One bounded ranged GET with article Referer returned a shared 744-byte HTML denial beginning <html>; no retry and no file retained.

reconnaissance.notes: Three bounded loops established complete issue discovery and high-quality article metadata. File delivery is blocked by the Digital Commons 403 route, so onboarding is metadata-only.

include: Article PDF links whose context parameter is njtip
exclude: Non-article front matter unless explicitly classified
scope.notes: Use issue record boundaries and the context=njtip guard.

entry_points.notes: Complete issue seed with no pagination.

nodes.notes: Digital Commons viewcontent endpoint; blocked in smoke.

edges.notes: Constrain within div.doc to avoid issue navigation.
Authoritative PDF URL meta; response is currently blocked.

archive_patterns.notes: Follow archive links rather than synthesize.
Canonical detail may normalize a trailing slash.
Enumerate only from issue/detail links; do not guess article ids.

pagination.termination: The single archive page lists 23 volumes and 78 issues and ends at Volume 1 Issue 1.
pagination.notes: Issue pages should be followed from the observed list.

layout_eras.label: Digital Commons all-issues, issue, and article templates
layout_eras.notes: Archive proves range; only newest issue/detail layout sampled.

sources.example: Cryptogatekeepers as a Response to Conflicts of Interest in Decentralized Finance

abstract.missingness: Present on sampled detail; historical completeness untested.

sources.notes: Year resolution only; online publication date meta was blank.

date.missingness: Only year was populated in sample.

pages.missingness: First page populated; ending page untested.

sources.locator: Compose from bepress title, author, date, volume, issue, and firstpage meta
sources.example: Vanessa Villanueva Collao, Cryptogatekeepers as a Response to Conflicts of Interest in Decentralized Finance, 23 Nw. J. Tech. & Intell. Prop. 435 (2026)
sources.notes: Generated citation, not a verbatim page field.

citation.missingness: Core components present on sampled detail.

patterns.notes: URL is discoverable but a ranged request with article Referer returned 403 HTML.

validation.notes: Response began <html>, not %PDF; no article-vs-issue validation was possible.

robots.notes: Publication HTML and viewcontent are not disallowed; avoid /do/, account, and administrative paths.

barriers.notes: Digital Commons viewcontent returned HTTP 403 with a 744-byte HTML denial even with the article Referer.
Denial response set an original_referer cookie; no retry was made under the bounded protocol.

access.politeness_notes: Robots first; three bounded loops; one failed ranged PDF smoke and no retry or bulk downloads.

verdict.summary: All-issues and issue/detail routes expose deterministic, high-quality metadata across a 2003-2026 archive, but the representative PDF endpoint returns 403 HTML.
blockers: Representative viewcontent PDF request returned HTTP 403 and no PDF bytes.
Only the newest issue/article layout was sampled.
verdict.next_action: Run metadata-only all-issues traversal and seek an approved Digital Commons file-delivery route before any PDF collection.
verdict.implementation_notes: Use the issue hop and citation meta for records; keep file collection paused and require %PDF plus application/pdf validation before saving any response.
